normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem SU2_some_implies_bounds_and_eq {arr : Array Int} {target : Int} {i : Nat} : SortedNondecreasing (arr.toList) -> binary_search arr target = some i -> i < arr.size -> arr[i] = target
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If the function returns Some(i), then i is within bounds and arr[i] equals the target.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem SU3_none_implies_absent {arr : Array Int} {target : Int} : SortedNondecreasing (arr.toList) -> binary_search arr target = none -> ¬ (∃ i : Nat, i < arr.size ∧ arr[i] = target)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If the function returns None, then the target does not occur anywhere in the array.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem SU4_binary_search_terminates {arr : Array Int} {target : Int} : SortedNondecreasing (arr.toList) -> Terminates (binary_search arr target)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The binary search loop terminates (the search interval shrinks each iteration).
